channel.title: Disney Tips - bound.tips
channel.description: Daily Disney tips extracted from top YouTube channels

item.title: Check the wait time for Winnie the Pooh which is currently 20 minutes, or PeopleMover at 15 minutes.
item.description: Check the wait time for Winnie the Pooh which is currently 20 minutes, or PeopleMover at 15 minutes. (Source: ResortTV1)

item.title: Consider riding the Tomorrowland Transit Authority PeopleMover for a 15-minute wait.
item.description: Consider riding the Tomorrowland Transit Authority PeopleMover for a 15-minute wait. (Source: ResortTV1)

item.title: Consider riding Tron Lightcycle / Run by joining 'Team Blue'.
item.description: Consider riding Tron Lightcycle / Run by joining 'Team Blue'. (Source: ResortTV1)

item.title: Head to Creations Shop in Epcot to browse merchandise before exploring the World Showcase.
item.description: Head to Creations Shop in Epcot to browse merchandise before exploring the World Showcase. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Try the cola-glazed sticky pork ribs from the Trow and Trellis food booth in Epcot.
item.description: Try the cola-glazed sticky pork ribs from the Trow and Trellis food booth in Epcot. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Get the garden vegetable flatbread from Trow and Trellis in Epcot for a large and good value fest...
item.description: Get the garden vegetable flatbread from Trow and Trellis in Epcot for a large and good value festival portion. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: When visiting the Canada pavilion in Epcot, try the maple popcorn from Popcorn Cart.
item.description: When visiting the Canada pavilion in Epcot, try the maple popcorn from Popcorn Cart. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Visit the Canada Far and Wide show in Epcot's World Showcase for a cool and shady break from the ...
item.description: Visit the Canada Far and Wide show in Epcot's World Showcase for a cool and shady break from the heat. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Skip the Galaxy Ripple chocolate bar in the UK pavilion for its exorbitant price and opt for the ...
item.description: Skip the Galaxy Ripple chocolate bar in the UK pavilion for its exorbitant price and opt for the Arrow peppermint or other more reasonably priced British sweets. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: If you enjoy mints, consider the Arrow peppermint chocolate for a reasonably priced treat in the ...
item.description: If you enjoy mints, consider the Arrow peppermint chocolate for a reasonably priced treat in the UK pavilion. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Ride Remy's Ratatouille Adventure in the France pavilion at Epcot.
item.description: Ride Remy's Ratatouille Adventure in the France pavilion at Epcot. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Get the desert pear and lime drink at the unnamed bar in the Morocco pavilion for a refreshing be...
item.description: Get the desert pear and lime drink at the unnamed bar in the Morocco pavilion for a refreshing beverage that tastes like Pandora's Night Blossom. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Try the rainbow Kakori (shaved ice) in Epcot for a perfect refreshment on a hot day.
item.description: Try the rainbow Kakori (shaved ice) in Epcot for a perfect refreshment on a hot day. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Use a filtered water bottle, like the Brita, to easily refill with palatable water from any tap i...
item.description: Use a filtered water bottle, like the Brita, to easily refill with palatable water from any tap in Disney World. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Book a dinner reservation at Sci-Fi Dine-In Theater in Hollywood Studios.
item.description: Book a dinner reservation at Sci-Fi Dine-In Theater in Hollywood Studios. (Source: DisneyInDetail)

item.title: Purchase a Lightning Lane for Avatar Flight of Passage if you wish to ride, as wait times can bec...
item.description: Purchase a Lightning Lane for Avatar Flight of Passage if you wish to ride, as wait times can become significant. (Source: PagingMrMorrow)

item.title: Try the spicy pulled pork steamed pods at Satu'li Canteen, which are recommended over the cheeseb...
item.description: Try the spicy pulled pork steamed pods at Satu'li Canteen, which are recommended over the cheeseburger pods. (Source: PagingMrMorrow)

item.title: Consider the 'Mahawwa Moose' dessert at Satu'li Canteen, a cinnamon milk chocolate mousse with ca...
item.description: Consider the 'Mahawwa Moose' dessert at Satu'li Canteen, a cinnamon milk chocolate mousse with caramelized banana cake. (Source: PagingMrMorrow)

item.title: Check wait times for Pandora attractions like Flight of Passage and Na'vi River Journey, as they ...
item.description: Check wait times for Pandora attractions like Flight of Passage and Na'vi River Journey, as they can be surprisingly low, sometimes under 30 minutes. (Source: PagingMrMorrow)

item.title: Get the Bluey-themed 'Wackadoo Fruit Freeze' and 'Fairy Bread Cake' at Pizzafari for a unique sna...
item.description: Get the Bluey-themed 'Wackadoo Fruit Freeze' and 'Fairy Bread Cake' at Pizzafari for a unique snack experience. (Source: PagingMrMorrow)

item.title: Visit Pizzafari and Rafiki's Planet Watch early, as both locations and the Bluey experience close...
item.description: Visit Pizzafari and Rafiki's Planet Watch early, as both locations and the Bluey experience close earlier than the rest of the park. (Source: PagingMrMorrow)

item.title: Try the 'Kabwa Cookie' at Harambe Market, a large, soft cookie topped with chocolate cream, cooki...
item.description: Try the 'Kabwa Cookie' at Harambe Market, a large, soft cookie topped with chocolate cream, cookies, potato chips, and M&Ms. (Source: PagingMrMorrow)

item.title: Book character meet-and-greets, like Nick and Judy from Zootopia, when queues appear empty, as th...
item.description: Book character meet-and-greets, like Nick and Judy from Zootopia, when queues appear empty, as they may roam freely. (Source: PagingMrMorrow)

item.title: Use the 'Fireworks Audio Mode' to lower the intensity of bangs and booms during fireworks shows w...
item.description: Use the 'Fireworks Audio Mode' to lower the intensity of bangs and booms during fireworks shows without losing the overall sound. (Source: ResortTV1)

item.title: Utilize the focus lock feature on the new streaming app to prevent fireworks from disrupting the ...
item.description: Utilize the focus lock feature on the new streaming app to prevent fireworks from disrupting the camera's focus. (Source: ResortTV1)

item.title: If visiting Disney Springs, you will likely need to drive as direct buses to parks from Disney Sp...
item.description: If visiting Disney Springs, you will likely need to drive as direct buses to parks from Disney Springs have been discontinued to manage parking. (Source: ResortTV1)

item.title: Resort hopping rules have not changed; you can still visit other resorts as long as you park in d...
item.description: Resort hopping rules have not changed; you can still visit other resorts as long as you park in designated areas like the Transportation and Ticket Center (TTC). (Source: ResortTV1)

item.title: If you plan to visit resorts, especially during holidays, you may be directed to park at the TTC ...
item.description: If you plan to visit resorts, especially during holidays, you may be directed to park at the TTC and use the monorail, rather than parking at the individual resorts. (Source: ResortTV1)

item.title: When staying at a resort, you can access resort amenities by scanning your ticket or MagicBand, w...
item.description: When staying at a resort, you can access resort amenities by scanning your ticket or MagicBand, with dedicated scanning points before bus areas. (Source: ResortTV1)

item.title: Adventures by Disney includes all tips in the trip cost, so you do not need to tip guides or staf...
item.description: Adventures by Disney includes all tips in the trip cost, so you do not need to tip guides or staff beyond the final tip for your adventure guides. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Consider booking a meal at Don Rufino's in La Fortuna, a popular spot recommended by guides.
item.description: Consider booking a meal at Don Rufino's in La Fortuna, a popular spot recommended by guides. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Try the chifrijo at Don Rufino's in La Fortuna, a local dish featuring beans, pork rinds, and avo...
item.description: Try the chifrijo at Don Rufino's in La Fortuna, a local dish featuring beans, pork rinds, and avocado. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Visit the natural hot springs in Costa Rica, which offer pools at varying temperatures, including...
item.description: Visit the natural hot springs in Costa Rica, which offer pools at varying temperatures, including hotter upper pools and cooler lower pools with sandy bottoms. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Head to Space Mountain first thing at rope drop if you are not using Lightning Lane, as it will h...
item.description: Head to Space Mountain first thing at rope drop if you are not using Lightning Lane, as it will have the shortest wait time of the day. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Be at the Disneyland gate by 7:30 AM or earlier to be ready for rope drop at 8:00 AM and maximize...
item.description: Be at the Disneyland gate by 7:30 AM or earlier to be ready for rope drop at 8:00 AM and maximize the first two hours in the park. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Avoid starting your day at 1:00 PM as this is peak crowd time when morning and afternoon guests c...
item.description: Avoid starting your day at 1:00 PM as this is peak crowd time when morning and afternoon guests converge, and popular Lightning Lane selections may be sold out. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Skip the fireworks and parades to take advantage of significantly shorter attraction queues durin...
item.description: Skip the fireworks and parades to take advantage of significantly shorter attraction queues during the show times, especially in the hour leading up to and during the event. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Be in your desired attraction queue by 9:45 PM before fireworks end, as crowds will flood back in...
item.description: Be in your desired attraction queue by 9:45 PM before fireworks end, as crowds will flood back into lines immediately after the show. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Consider riding attractions near parades like Matterhorn, Small World, Space Mountain, or Indiana...
item.description: Consider riding attractions near parades like Matterhorn, Small World, Space Mountain, or Indiana Jones during the parade, but be mindful of the parade's path. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Take advantage of low crowds during parade times for attractions near Fantasmic, such as Pirates ...
item.description: Take advantage of low crowds during parade times for attractions near Fantasmic, such as Pirates of the Caribbean and Haunted Mansion. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Have lunch around 11:00 AM to avoid the main lunch rush that starts around Noon.
item.description: Have lunch around 11:00 AM to avoid the main lunch rush that starts around Noon. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: From Noon to 5:00 PM is the busiest time at Disneyland; use this period for low-impact rides, non...
item.description: From Noon to 5:00 PM is the busiest time at Disneyland; use this period for low-impact rides, non-Lightning Lane attractions, or taking a break. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: During a daytime parade (1:00 PM - 3:00 PM), queues for attractions will be shorter, offering a g...
item.description: During a daytime parade (1:00 PM - 3:00 PM), queues for attractions will be shorter, offering a good opportunity to ride. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: From 7:00 PM to 8:30 PM, wait times begin to improve as some guests leave or prepare for evening ...
item.description: From 7:00 PM to 8:30 PM, wait times begin to improve as some guests leave or prepare for evening entertainment. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Between 8:30 PM and 10:00 PM, crowds decrease significantly as guests either head home or find sp...
item.description: Between 8:30 PM and 10:00 PM, crowds decrease significantly as guests either head home or find spots for evening shows. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Get in line for an attraction just before park closing for a 'free ride' as the queues remain ope...
item.description: Get in line for an attraction just before park closing for a 'free ride' as the queues remain open until the last guest has ridden. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Book a Port Adventure like a family bike and snorkel pack in advance for Castaway Cay.
item.description: Book a Port Adventure like a family bike and snorkel pack in advance for Castaway Cay. (Source: SoCalDisneyDad)

item.title: Arrive at the dining venues at Lookout Cay at Lighthouse Point right when they open at 11:30 AM t...
item.description: Arrive at the dining venues at Lookout Cay at Lighthouse Point right when they open at 11:30 AM to secure a table, as they fill up quickly. (Source: SoCalDisneyDad)

item.title: Prioritize securing a table at the Lookout Cay dining areas before getting food, as seating is li...
item.description: Prioritize securing a table at the Lookout Cay dining areas before getting food, as seating is limited and fills up rapidly. (Source: SoCalDisneyDad)

item.title: While burgers at Lookout Cay are average, consider trying the ribs and the pineapple avocado sala...
item.description: While burgers at Lookout Cay are average, consider trying the ribs and the pineapple avocado salad for better flavors. (Source: SoCalDisneyDad)
